description_long: This hammer features a robust, cylindrical metal head with two rounded striking faces, typical of a sledge or mallet style. The head is solid and appears to be made of steel or a similar heavy-duty metal, designed for delivering powerful blows. The handle is straight, crafted from wood, and has a natural brown finish, providing a classic look and a comfortable grip. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, with no visible fasteners or joints. The hammer is shown alongside other tools, but its distinct shape and material set it apart. There are no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear, indicating it is in pristine condition.
description: A classic hammer with a solid metal head and a straight wooden handle, designed for heavy-duty striking tasks. The hammer appears new and unmarked, with a smooth, natural finish.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the top, showing the rounded end of the head and the straight alignment of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: The hammer is viewed from the front, clearly displaying the cylindrical metal head and the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: The hammer is seen from the bottom, highlighting the handle's end and the symmetry of the head.
description_view_3: The hammer is viewed from the side, showing the profile of the head and the straight wooden handle.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle with a smooth, natural finish and no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: cylindrical sledge-style head with two rounded striking faces, made of metal
